verse_text: For Herod himself had sent and laid hold of John, and bound him in prison for the sake of Herodias, his brother Philip's wife; for he had married her.

links.context: This is the same Herod to whom Pilate would send Jesus during His trial (23:7). He is the son of the Herod who slew the innocent infants in Bethlehem ([[MAT.2:16]]). The incident of the beheading of St. John is found in [[MRK.6:14]]-28.
